channel.title: GitHub Cython Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Cython in GitHub

item.title: openai/mujoco-py
item.description: MuJoCo is a physics engine for detailed, efficient rigid body simulations with contacts. mujoco-py allows using MuJoCo from Python 3.

item.title: rushter/selectolax
item.description: Python binding to Modest and Lexbor engines. Fast HTML5 parser with CSS selectors.
